prompt:
Healer — fleet health sweep with session depth capture. 

**Standard checks:**
1. Run per-agent health check from ~/blum/shared/fleet-health-check.md template
2. Check all agents: alive, memory, identity docs, cron

**NEW — Session depth capture for degraded/xml agents:**
When an agent is flagged as `degraded/xml`, append to `~/blum/shared/fleet-health/degraded-xml-log.jsonl`:

```json
{"timestamp":"<ISO 8601>","agent":"<name>","homologfull_cycle_count":<int>,"room_message_count":<int>,"notes":"<context>"}
```

- `homologfull_cycle_count`: Read agent's homolog at ~/blum/homes/<name>/homolog.jsonl, count lines
- `room_message_count`: Count messages in triggering room since agent's last restart (proxy: first message in recent history)
- `notes`: Any relevant context (triggering room, XML error type, etc.)

**Output:** Report summary to broadcast@cochairs. Flag degraded/offline agents.

This patch implements Eiran's threshold-crossing hypothesis test infrastructure.
